scripts.db:setup: cd carbon-dpi-registry && npx prisma db push && cd ../carbon-dpi-reference-node && npx prisma db push
scripts.keygen: cd carbon-dpi-reference-node && node -e "const { generateKeyPairSync } = require('node:crypto'); const { publicKey, privateKey } = generateKeyPairSync('ed25519'); console.log('BECKN_ED25519_PRIVATE_KEY=' + privateKey.export({type: 'pkcs8', format: 'der'}).toString('base64')); console.log('BECKN_ED25519_PUBLIC_KEY=' + publicKey.export({type: 'spki', format: 'der'}).toString('base64'));"
